title: XIFT v1.0 XiftSemanticResponse Bundle (Channel 5 SDR)
description: The ranked bundle a responder (peer or Custodian) returns for a XiftSemanticQuery. Signed with Ed25519 over JCS(response minus responder_signature). May be partial (completed=false) when max_latency_ms is reached or aggregation is ongoing. Source: xift-1.0-spec-channel-5.md §5, §6, §7.

responder_did.description: DID of the responder (peer in Flow A; Custodian in mediated mode).

match_count.description: Number of matches in this bundle; MAY be < max_results. SHOULD equal matches array length.

matches.description: Ranked candidate matches. Across scatter-gather, duplicates by envelope_id_hint MUST be deduplicated by the querier (§9).

completed.description: Whether this is the final response (true) or a partial one (false).

partial_reason.description: Why the response is partial (timeout, ongoing aggregation). REQUIRED when completed=false.

responder_signature.description: Base64url Ed25519 signature over JCS(response minus this field).

signing_key_id.description: DID URL fragment identifying the signing key.

then.x-xift-note: A partial bundle (completed=false) MUST state why via partial_reason (§5).

match.description: A single candidate match (§6). preview MUST be PII-redacted and <= sdr_preview_size_max (200 chars, §11).

candidate_did.description: DID of the agent holding the candidate artifact.

envelope_id_hint.description: OPTIONAL. Specific artifact identifier, if known; dedup key across scatter-gather.

composite_score.description: Aggregate match score in [0.0, 1.0] (§7). Aggregation function is implementation-defined.

semantic_alignment.description: Query/candidate embedding similarity; vocabulary-aware when the query attaches an ontology descriptor (§7.1).

preview.description: Short, PII-redacted summary fragment to aid candidate selection. Truncated to sdr_preview_size_max (§11).

purpose_compatible.description: Whether the candidate's declared purpose_of_use matches the query.

handoff_endpoint.description: URL to fetch the full envelope via Channel 2.

scs_endpoint.description: OPTIONAL. URL to open Channel 7 (SCS) with this candidate.

unit_interval.x-xift-note: JCS/RFC 8785 canonicalizes numbers; responders SHOULD emit a stable decimal representation to keep responder_signature reproducible.
